steps.title: Clear the first decimal
steps.content:
Multiply the first equation by $10$, then move terms to one side.
$$-8y=7x+24$$
$$7x+8y=-24$$
Rewrite the second equation as
$$2x+3y=21$$

steps.title: Eliminate y
steps.content:
Make the $y$-coefficients match.
$$21x+24y=-72$$
$$16x+24y=168$$
Subtract the second equation from the first.
$$5x=-240$$
